top_critical.title: CVE-2026-20253: Critical Splunk RCE Flaw
top_critical.summary: A critical vulnerability (CVE-2026-20253, CVSS 9.8) in Splunk Enterprise allows unauthenticated attackers to perform arbitrary file operations and execute remote code. Affected versions are Splunk Ent
top_critical.architects_take: Patch Splunk Enterprise to version 10.2.4 or 10.0.7 immediately. Until patching is complete, restrict network access to Splunk management interfaces and ingestion endpoints using firewall rules or security group policies to limit exposure to trusted IP ranges only.
